texto: Humans are a social species more than any other, and in order to build a community, which for some reason humans have to do in order to live, we have to solve the communication problem. Language is the tool that was invented to solve that problem.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Daniel Everett sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Humans are a social species more than any other, and in order to build a community, which for som…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, community, language, útil em momentos de language e problem.
